name: Amanda DePalma
subject: can't make it to New Hampshire?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Peter,
As you may have heard, there is an excitement on the ground in New Hampshire for Christie that continues to build as we get closer to Election Day. Our volunteers' efforts in the state are crucial to helping spread Christie's message and fight against the negative attacks.
**See what one of our volunteers had to say after spending 48 hours in New Hampshire:**
_
> Mike S. went to New Hampshire and spent the weekend knocking doors up at 6am to bed at 1am. He said, "It was amazing being part of a very committed team and just watching the excitement build as the weekend went on."
_
We need more people like Mike S. out there working hard for Governor Christie.
We know it isn't easy for everyone to make it up to New Hampshire, but you can also participate by donating to our "Get Out The Vote" fund!
**[Donate $5, $10, or $15 today to help us send more volunteers out to knock doors and make phone calls to reach __even more voters__.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45724439:JjNoSrrNj:m:1:1516426255:1015D3025B7A327C9BEA70543616BCE7:r)**
Let's Go!
Amanda
P.S. The walk books are made and the hand warmers are purchased. **[Click here and help by contributing to the "Get Out The Vote" fund now!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45724439:JjNoSrrNj:m:1:1516426255:1015D3025B7A327C9BEA70543616BCE7:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45724440:JjNoSrrNj:m:1:1516426255:1015D3025B7A327C9BEA70543616BCE7:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: My plan to fix American education:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759507:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r)
---

Peter,

I was blessed as a child to have a mother who recognized the value of a good education.
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759507:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r)
---
Despite having only completed third grade, she understood that knowledge was key and instilled in me an appreciation for learning and reading.

She understood that education was the ladder that would lead out of poverty and into realizing the American Dream.

Sadly, our current education system is failing our children. Without change, they will never be prepared for the challenges of the 21st century.

To be successful, we must take the federal bureaucracy out of education and concentrate on empowering the American people -- **and today I'm proud to share my plan to do just that.

**[**Please take a minute to watch my short video above, and read my 5 Principles to Restore American Exceptionalism in Our Schools**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759507:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r), which are as follows:
* School Choice
* Empower Parents, Teachers, Local School Districts & the States \-- not Washington, D.C.
* Encourage Innovation
* Reward Good Teachers
* A Simpler, Streamlined Student Loan Process

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759507:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r)
---
Peter, we owe it to our children and to ourselves to restore our education system to global preeminence.

I believe this common sense, conservative, principled approach will enable us to do so.
[**If you agree with my plan to fix American education, please help to make it a reality by making a donation now.

And for a donation of $25 or more, we'll even send you a revised Kids Edition of my book, _Gifted Hands_.

**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759507:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r)Thank you for working with me to heal, inspire and revive this great nation, and for your generous and steadfast support.

Together, we're going to continue to surprise the political class, and ensure a brighter future of unlimited opportunity for our children and grandchildren.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759507:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759508:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759509:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759510:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759511:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32759512:smxJTZyNL:m:1:876315805:2BA5798DE7F3C1F9371B88B965E8E339:r)

name: Doug Stafford
subject: They can't deny this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

Things are really heating up in this race for
the White House in 2016.
And things are looking great for Rand.

Yesterday, he rang in his 53rd birthday with
several hundred supporters in Iowa and had the opportunity to
announce the campaign has 1,007 precinct captains committed for
the caucus on Feb 1st and a 500 person leadership team in New
Hampshire!

There's no denying - no matter how hard the
media tries - Rand Paul has a top tier campaign and we're in this
to win it.

We have the team committed to winning Iowa in
23 days - and we're committed to continuing our success
afterwards.

The media can try to block us out, but we're
not going anywhere. We're poised to shock the nation.

We have over 400 fully operational grassroots
groups and we're on the ballot in every state.

The Washington Machine has something to fear.
And it's never been more clear.

If you Stand with Rand, through Iowa and
beyond, contribute $25 today to help fund our efforts in vital
primary states.

Let's win this thing.

In liberty,
Doug Stafford

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: 2016 Founding Member Updates
subject: Status update:
body:
Friend -- Since Jeb emailed calling for 5,000 additional 2016 Founding Members, the number of people that have stepped up to get his back has been jaw dropping.

But we still have a ways to go before the deadline at midnight tonight, and our records indicate you haven't updated your status.

With only 24 days until voting starts, we need you to confirm your 2016 Founding Member status right now.

[**We need just 492 more supporters to step up to meet our goal of 15,000 by midnight tonight, so please contribute just $1 right now.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cpqrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczspjphh_ufpnnmcy.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Jeb needs you now, Friend. With only 24 days left, there's no time to waste.

[**Jeb2016.com/2016-Founding-Member/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lgnpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclgwgzk_ufpnnmcy.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Team Jeb

name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Trump: "I would love to run against Bernie"
body:
#
Donald Trump in Burlington last night:
**"Oh, would I love to run against Bernie."**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b43/43f17890/4748090e/620fadd6/594982218/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our--political--revolution?refcode=em160108gif")
Apparently Donald didn't see the most recent poll where he loses to Bernie, 51% to 38%.

**Help nominate Bernie, and we'll go head to head with Donald Trump. Then we'll put Bernie in the White House.**
**[Contribute $3](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b43/43f17890/4748090e/620fadd6/594982218/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our--political--revolution?refcode=em160108gif")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b43/43f17890/4748090e/620fadd7/594982218/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b43/43f17890/4748090e/620fadd4/594982218/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b43/43f17890/4748090e/620fadd5/594982218/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2b43/43f17890/4748090e/620fadd2/594982218/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Katie McGinty
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend,

In the months since we launched this campaign, I've been fortunate enough to speak with Pennsylvanians from all walks of life. I've been struck by the unique and moving stories I've heard from folks all across the Commonwealth -- the hopes of passionate voters who are looking for positive changes in their communities and in our country.

A college student looking to start a career in clean energy. A woman working hard to grow her small business. Each and every person I've talked with has had unique priorities and a different -- but promising -- vision for our nation.

So now, I want to hear from _you_. **Friend, what issues matter most to you? What are your top priorities for this campaign?**
| [Protecting Social Security & Medicare](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Raising the minimum wage](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Creating jobs](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Combating climate change](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Advocating for reproductive health](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Making higher education more affordable](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Reducing gun violence](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
| [Other](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10)
---
[_(Click here to let me know your priorities)_](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4896235229649305600?ms=20160108&refcode=20160108&amount=10) Thank you for your thoughtful response, and thank you for being a supporter of this grassroots campaign.

Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4752120041573449728?refcode=e20160108&refcode2=e20160108&amount=10)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/685940331966889984/-4968292823687233536).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Rand Paul
subject: The question I want to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,

President Obama's anti-gun dog and pony show
with CNN last night was all about how to "fix" gun violence in
America.

Like how?

Like he's fixed American healthcare with
ObamaCare? Or addressed our debt problem by piling on $8.2
TRILLION more?

Or fought ISIS by throwing our doors wide
open to dangerous Middle Eastern refugees -- even when FBI says
they can't be vetted?

Remember, Patriot, this new push for gun
control, and the recently-released horde of new executive actions
the administration unveiled earlier this week was all based in
response to December's San Bernardino tragedy.

So we're supposed to believe killers who cram
their home full of illegal pipe bombs and IEDs would somehow
follow the new gun control laws this President wants?

This is exactly the kind of madness I'm
running against. It's what my presidential campaign is all about.

Just in the past 24 hours, my campaign
announced that we have 500-member leadership team in New
Hampshire and precinct captains in 1,007 of Iowa's precincts.

That's a figure the Wall Street Journal calls
"impressive for any campaign."

I think it's just more proof we're we're
hitting our stride at just the right time.

My events in Iowa today were slam-packed.
Energy is sky-high.

I'm in this race to win it.

Instead of blaming our liberties for the
problems we face today, we should lay the blame where it belongs
. . .

At the feet of politicians who care more
about amassing power and centralizing control over our lives in
Washington, D.C. than about upholding their oaths to protect the
U.S. Constitution.

We can win. I know it.

But I must be able to count on your support.
So please agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or
even $10 right away!

More great campaign updates are coming!

In liberty,
Rand Paul

Chip in $25 >>

Chip in $50 >>

Chip in $75 >>

Chip in $100 >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

Instead of blaming our liberties for the problems we face today, we should lay the blame where it belongs . . . At the feet of politicians who care more about amassing power and centralizing control over our lives in Washington, D.C. than about upholding their oaths to protect the U.S. Constitution. We can win. I know it. But I must be able to count on your support. So please agree to your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away! More great campaign updates are coming! In liberty, Rand Paul Chip in $25 >> Chip in $50 >> Chip in $75 >> Chip in $100 >> Or donate another amount >> Paid for by Rand Paul for President This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 16, 2015. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-31651051076-echo3-17CD0A4FB85D5CCA4E9C881B4DCE9BEA@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line. ----Powered by Paramount Communication----

name: Rick Santorum
subject: A Special Invitation, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,
You could be my VIP guest for the next presidential debate in Charleston, SC! I really enjoyed meeting Joanne and her husband -- our last debate sweepstakes winner. We flew them into Las Vegas, NV where they spent the time with me & my team and then were escorted as my VIP guests to the Republican debate. It was a fantastic way to share the experience. I'd like to, personally, make that offer again for the upcoming Fox Business News Debate being held on January 14th in Charleston, SC. You and a friend, could be my VIP guest! Your flight, hotel and a pair of tickets are on us, and all you need to do is enter the sweepstakes to be eligible. **There's not much time so be sure to enter today!** ****[Your donation of $20.16 or more will automatically enter you win!](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Drjs_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=1)**** I hope to meet you, _Friend,_ and escort you to one of the last Republican Presidential Debates before the Iowa Caucus! [Enter Here with your support of $20.16 or more!](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Drjs_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=2) God Bless,
Rick P.S. We are announcing the winner Monday night. If you'd like to watch it live, follow me at [Rick Santorum](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum%2F&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=3) on Facebook.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN THIS PROMOTION. No contribution of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances or odds of winning. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Void where prohibited. All applicable federal, state, and local laws and regulations apply.

Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fcharleston-debate%3Fsc%3Ddaniel_debate&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=4) to enter by making a contribution of $20.16.

Please [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/debate_contest?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=5) to enter without making a contribution. You must complete and submit the online entry form during the contest period.

This Promotion begins on Wednesday, January 6, 2016 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time and ends on Sunday, January 10, 2016 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time (“Entry Period”). All entries must be received by11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, January 10, 2016. One winner will receive the following Prize: two tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary Debate in Charleston, SC on January 14, 2016; a $600 travel stipend for travel to Charleston, South Carolina for the winner and one guest, with an approximate retail value of $600; and hotel accommodations for the winner and a guest, with an approximate retail value of $250. Prize may not be substituted or exchanged and is not redeemable for cash. All federal, state, and local taxes associated with the receipt or use of any prize awarded are the sole responsibility of the winner. The Sponsor of this Promotion is Santorum For President 2016, PO Box 247 Verona, PA 15147.

---
Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so if you have any thoughts on anything at all, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/contact?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=6) and let us know. We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=7) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ffacebook.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=8), [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=9), or [Instagram](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Finstagram.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=10).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help us reclaim the American Dream for hardworking families.**

Santorum for President 2016, PO Box 238, Verona, PA 15147

[Privacy Policy](http://www.ricksantorum.com/privacy?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rjs_debate&n=11)

name: VETO ALERT (via boldpac.com)
subject: Obamacare SURVIVES
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
[BREAKING: President Obama VETOES Obamacare Repeal](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246ca/134475358/VEsH/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-Obama-Veto2016?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.08_B2_Obama-Veto_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246ca/134475358/VEsE/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-Obama-Veto2016?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.08_B2_Obama-Veto_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
[](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246ca/134475358/VEsF/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-Obama-Veto2016?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.08_B2_Obama-Veto_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")

**[Please sign your name to thank President Obama>>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246ca/134475358/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-Obama-Veto2016?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.08_B2_Obama-Veto_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")**

Republicans succeeded this week in sending a bill to repeal Obamacare to the President's desk for the very first time.

**But minutes ago, the President officially vetoed the bill.**

Make no mistake: that's a HUGE victory for us... and a HUMILIATING setback for Republican extremists.

Will you sign our card thanking the President for standing strongly against Republican attacks on affordable healthcare?

Sign your name thank President Obama for vetoing the ACA repeal: [http://go.boldpac.com/Thank-Obama-Veto2016](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246ca/134475358/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/Thank-Obama-Veto2016?source=MS_EM_PET_2016.01.08_B2_Obama-Veto_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")

Thank you for all that you do,

_BOLD PAC_

| |

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246cb/134475358/VEsA/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246cb/134475358/VEsB/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246c8/134475358/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea727/e60883a/7180c444/144246c8/134475358/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
